title: Define SourceRecord + Datasheet + provenance JSONL schemas
context: M0 foundation for ewing-single-cell-atlas. Every later license, provenance and annotation gate depends on machine-checkable schemas. Binding cancer guardrails apply: ONLY open-access / aggregate / de-identified public data; controlled-access (dbGaP, EGA, individual-level biobanks) and any identifiable patient data are out of scope; not medical advice; when in doubt, stop and surface. No partner/beneficiary is secured yet, so verifiedNeed is false.
objective: Define and document the SourceRecord, Datasheet, ProvenanceEvent, and AnnotationAssertion JSON schemas (with validating example instances) that the pipeline and CI gates will enforce.
acceptanceCriteria: SourceRecord, Datasheet, ProvenanceEvent, and AnnotationAssertion schemas defined, with example instances that validate.
Provenance schema requires a per-assertion source-citation field.
Schemas referenced by the CI schema-validate job; example instances pass in CI.
resources: Gebru et al., Datasheets for Datasets
